summary: Matched a large set of Kirby copied Neutral-B functions in src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNZd.c, especially Sheik needle and Mewtwo shadow-ball copy behavior. The bot report records 18 new function matches and one .sdata2 improvement for this unit.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; replaces multiple placeholder functions with matched C implementations and small cleanup/refactor edits.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNZd.c added 637 deleted 62 hunks 17

diff.diff: includes itseakneedlethrown.h, adds extern Vec3/float/u32 data declarations, implements ftKb_SpecialNSk_8010603C, fn_80106DB0, ftKb_SpecialNMt_801071FC, ftKb_SpecialNMt_80107410, ftKb_MtSpecialNStart_Anim, ftKb_MtSpecialNLoop_Anim, ftKb_MtSpecialAirNStart_Anim, ftKb_MtSpecialAirNLoop_Anim, and IASA functions
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists 18 new matches in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNZd

what_changed: Added the thrown Sheik needle item include and external declarations for ftKb_Init_803B7570, ftKb_Init_803B757C, ftKb_Init_803CB770, and ftKb_Init_803CB828 used by newly matched functions.

Implemented Sheik-copy needle functions including ftKb_SpecialNSk_8010603C and fn_80106DB0, spawning needle items through it_802AFD8C/it_802AFEA8, applying ground/air graphic offsets, random y offsets via ftKb_Init_803CB770, effects, and SFX.
Added a shared inline ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs to set death2_cb and take_dmg_cb, replacing repeated callback assignments in several action setup paths.

Implemented Mewtwo-copy charge/release behavior: ftKb_SpecialNMt_801071FC, ftKb_SpecialNMt_SetRecoil, ftKb_SpecialNMt_80107410, ground and air start/loop animation functions, and IASA-related functions.

Cleaned local generated-looking code in several small places, including using GET_FIGHTER instead of direct HSD_GObjGetUserData syntax, using NULL for pointer clears, replacing temporary variables with direct field checks or ternary timer assignment, and reducing duplicate callback assignment blocks.
Bot report recorded +6208 matched bytes, 18 new 100% function matches, and .sdata2 improvement from 37.50% to 79.07% for the same unit.

smart_moves.title: Factored repeated Kirby special callback setup
smart_moves.text: The PR introduces ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs and reuses it where multiple paths set death2_cb to ftKb_Init_800EE74C and take_dmg_cb to ftKb_Init_800EE7B8. This keeps repeated behavior localized while preserving the same assignments.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: static inline void ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs(Fighter_GObj* gobj)
diff.diff: repeated replacement of fp->death2_cb/fp->take_dmg_cb blocks with ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs(gobj)

smart_moves.title: Shared held-shadow creation between ground and air Mewtwo loops
smart_moves.text: The PR extracts ftKb_SpecialNMt_CreateHeldShadow, then calls it from both ftKb_MtSpecialNLoop_Anim and ftKb_MtSpecialAirNLoop_Anim, while leaving ground/air-specific full-charge vectors separate.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: static inline void ftKb_SpecialNMt_CreateHeldShadow(Fighter_GObj* gobj, Vec3* pos1, Vec3* pos2)
diff.diff: ftKb_MtSpecialNLoop_Anim assigns sp34 = ftKb_Init_803B7570
diff.diff: ftKb_MtSpecialAirNLoop_Anim assigns sp34 = ftKb_Init_803B757C

smart_moves.title: Used bot report as narrow verification evidence
smart_moves.text: The available PR evidence includes a bot report naming every newly matched function and the exact unit, giving concrete support for the claimed matching progress.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small inline helpers can be useful when several matched functions share identical setup blocks, but the PR evidence supports this only for repeated callback setup and held-shadow creation in this file.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs reused across Sheik and Mewtwo copied-special setup functions
diff.diff: ftKb_SpecialNMt_CreateHeldShadow reused by ground and air Mewtwo loop animation functions

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching fighter item-spawn functions, preserving the item_gobj across item launch can matter: ftKb_SpecialNMt_801071FC saves fp->item_gobj before it_802C53F0/ftKb_SpecialNMt_80107040 and restores it afterward.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ftKb_SpecialNMt_801071FC declares Item_GObj* saved_item, assigns saved_item = fp->item_gobj, calls it_802C53F0 and ftKb_SpecialNMt_80107040, then restores fp->item_gobj = saved_item

decomp_lessons.lesson: Ground and air variants may share most control flow while differing only in constants, motion states, or data vectors; this PR matched paired Mewtwo ground/air loop functions with parallel structure and distinct ftKb_Init_803B7570/ftKb_Init_803B757C vectors.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ftKb_MtSpecialNLoop_Anim and ftKb_MtSpecialAirNLoop_Anim have parallel charge-loop/full-charge structure
diff.diff: ground loop uses ftKb_MS_MtSpecialNLoopFull and ftKb_Init_803B7570; air loop uses ftKb_MS_MtSpecialAirNLoopFull and ftKb_Init_803B757C

naming_conventions.name: ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs
naming_conventions.convention: Uses ftKb_SpecialN prefix and a concise action description for common Neutral-B callback setup.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: static inline void ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs(Fighter_GObj* gobj)

naming_conventions.name: ftKb_SpecialNMt_SetRecoil
naming_conventions.convention: Uses SpecialNMt to indicate Kirby Mewtwo-copy Neutral-B behavior and SetRecoil to describe recoil velocity assignment.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: inline void ftKb_SpecialNMt_SetRecoil(Fighter_GObj* gobj)

naming_conventions.name: ftKb_SpecialNMt_CreateHeldShadow
naming_conventions.convention: Uses SpecialNMt plus a verb phrase for creating the held Mewtwo shadow item.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: static inline void ftKb_SpecialNMt_CreateHeldShadow(Fighter_GObj* gobj, Vec3* pos1, Vec3* pos2)

naming_conventions.name: perm_randi
naming_conventions.convention: The PR itself labels this as a permuter-generated helper and likely fake; this is not evidence of an accepted naming convention.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: comment '// permuter-generated helper, almost certainly fake' above static inline s32 perm_randi(int n)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Supported as a tactic used by this PR, not as a global style recommendation. The bot report supports function matches, but there is no reviewer discussion explaining each padding decision.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced small inline wrappers/helpers to influence or preserve matching shape while avoiding repeated blocks.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used explicit local declarations and narrow scopes to steer codegen, including repeated GET_FIGHTER declarations inside switch case blocks and f64 padding locals.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used ternary expressions for simple selected assignments when replacing generated-looking timer variables.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: fp->mv.kb.specialhi.xC = (fp->fv.kb.x9C == 0) ? da->specialn_mt_frames_to_transition : 0 in ftKb_SpecialNMt_80107568 and ftKb_SpecialNMt_80107638

Search later PRs touching ftKb_SpecialNMt_SetRecoil or ftKb_SpecialNMt_CreateHeldShadow for whether inline helper style was retained.
Search current source for ftKb_Init_803CB770 and ftKb_Init_803CB828 ownership or symbol metadata if curating path/data facts.
Search for other Kirby copied-special PRs that use ftKb_SpecialN_set_cbs or similar callback setup helpers.

rejection_notes: Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or specific reviewer preferences; there were no review comments in the loaded evidence.

Do not promote PAD_STACK, f64 pad locals, u8 dummy arrays, or duplicate assignment forms as accepted style from this PR alone; loaded standards require explicit verifier evidence and cleanup reasoning.
Do not treat the name perm_randi as a good naming convention; the diff comment calls it permuter-generated and almost certainly fake.
Do not claim all functions in the raw diff were inspected exhaustively because the loaded diff is truncated.
